product_results.title: Nike Womens Air Max Correlate Running Trainers 511417 Sneakers Shoes

summary.text: Customers find these shoes comfortable and supportive. They describe the shoes as good looking and mention they have a big mom vibe. Customers are happy with the color. However, opinions are mixed regarding the fit, quality, and size of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Good fit, good support, and nice colour combinations.
authors_reviews.text: These are my go to shoes for walking on holidays. Good support and they never hurt my feet. I do a lot of walking so that is important.
authors_reviews.author: Margaret

authors_reviews.title: Robuste
authors_reviews.text: Très belle , bonne taille et super confortable . Arrivé dans sa boite Nike .
authors_reviews.author: Claudine Carrier

authors_reviews.title: Nice shoes
authors_reviews.text: Fit true to size, beautiful shoes. Only giving 4 stars because they came a little later than they said they would. They were delayed awhile, but did come!
authors_reviews.author: Cassia Davy

authors_reviews.title: Love these!!
authors_reviews.text: Fit great and super comfy!! Absolutely love the colours!
authors_reviews.author: Ken

authors_reviews.title: Don’t question, just buy them!
authors_reviews.text: Sizing is perfect, great condition, super comfortable!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Run small l, colour may be different but super cute!!!
authors_reviews.text: I'll start by saying these shoes are so sharp. Honestly, great looking sneakers. If that is all you are looking for then these are for you.I will be returning mine unfortunately.Reasons:They fit small. I am usually an 8.5 to 9 depending on the shoe. I ordered a 9 and they fit but my foot felt crammed in. The width was not a comfortable wide for me. They could be good with a narrower foot but go a half size up for sure.Colour was not quite as pictured. The colour was more purple than the burgundy as pictured. Still nice but not what I expected.These could be comfy if I went a half size up but not for exercise. They are very bulky in the back and didn't feel stable for anything more than walking.All in all, very attractive shoe. Comfy for minimal exercise, great looking everyday sneaker, not for the gym or a run etcThey just were not for me and for what I was looking for. Honestly, I would have kept them just for a stylish running shoe and for everyday wear but my budget was for something I could work out in and these just aren't it.
authors_reviews.author: stephanie loreto
